original_image_tags: Signature of James J. Hausman, written over the typed name W. R. CLINGERMAN.

elements.description: Typed letter from W. R. Clingerman, Colonel, USAF, Chief, Technical Intelligence Division, Intelligence Department, dated 9 Sept 1948, addressed to Project 'SIGN', Director, Federal Bureau of Investigation. Includes a handwritten signature for James J. Hausman, Lt Col, USAF, and a handwritten notation 'for' next to the signature block. The word 'Incl' is typed on the left side. The word 'Confidential' is stamped at the top and bottom of the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the same visual content: a typed letter with a handwritten signature for James J. Hausman over a typed name, with no actual photographs, sketches, or diagrams present on the page.
